name: Text
description: A typography primitive for rendering body text. Supports configurable font size, line height, truncation, line clamping, and gradient text variant.

truncate.description: Truncates text with ellipsis at the specified end.

lineClamp.description: Number of lines after which text is clamped with ellipsis.

inline.description: Sets line-height to 1 for inline centering.

inherit.description: Inherits font properties from parent element.
